title: apogon humilis
intro: Apogon humilis, also known as the dwarf apogon or small fruited apogon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Haemodoraceae, native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Apogon humilis include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Apogon humilis can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
